{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230344441EC1918CD7F471C83AD6"}"},"total":67},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7610397703373931288","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"太！好！看！了！前面可能有一点点小矛盾，但是坚持住啊！后面真的渐入佳境！我还要看呃啊啊啊啊！戒断反应要犯了！作者大大能不能一天爆更100章救我狗命！[爱慕]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1771935974,"group_id":"7582555006851615806","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9gF+Hae/4SUgiWhNtM5SzfdV99tQ6OB0Bg+MIqOkJxC","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776788850&x-signature=sYCOa%2F9ZxoTl7Yne0kWtutXwoT0%3D","user_id":"3202254206154376","user_name":"素望堂的薛天"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3202254206154376","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7582555006851615806","book_info":{"abstract":"【末世天灾+游戏降临+升级流+无CP+生死游戏】
蓝星公元2092年，一场大雾从地下慢慢滋生，将城市变成一座座孤岛。
与此同时有幸运玩家被拖入一场场突然降临的生死游戏中。
不可预测的灾难接连在现实世界上演，整个星球持续崩坏。
直到有一天，所有人都被拖进这场宏大的游戏盛宴，游戏既主宰生死，又为末日下艰难求生的人们提供丰厚的回报——只要能活着离开游戏。

在游戏全面降临前被选中进入游戏的白晓，原以为要充当炮灰，没想到能在一场场游戏中存活下来，从害怕到适应到逐渐掌控力量，甚至如鱼得水。
谁说先被选中就是小白鼠，能先人一步提升实力，这叫幸运！
刀尖舔血，只是血液沸腾的前兆，游走在生死边缘，那不是找死，那叫刺激！
绝不居于人下，绝不为游戏掌控，哪怕以命为赌，不走到游戏尽头，绝不认输！
（ps:成长型女主，不是一上来就杀伐果决狠辣无情武力值爆棚那种，既然是成长型，前期一定有不完美，介意慎入，初入游戏基本是蛰伏蓄力状态，随游戏实力渐强，爽点一定有，作者喜欢厚积薄发式的爽。）","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o9c0ef0f6d3206205fb85b5cdd225ba51~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"不周盗","author_id":"","book_id":"7582555006851615806","book_name":"世界灾变后我靠游戏生存","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#302020","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3981人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":8,"name":"科幻末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=8&name=科幻末世&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":86,"name":"女强","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=86&name=女强&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":44,"name":"空间","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=44&name=空间&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":392,"name":"无CP","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=392&name=无CP&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":537,"name":"惊悚游戏","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=537&name=惊悚游戏&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":658,"name":"天灾","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=658&name=天灾&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7582557409881637438","read_count":"3981","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"498073"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"5.9","serial_count":"239","tags":"科幻末世,空间,女强,无CP,惊悚游戏,天灾","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o9c0ef0f6d3206205fb85b5cdd225ba51~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779392684&x-signature=sw7PYRwnZeiEkMsEN2R5Gtz3uTA%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"104668478634","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"186"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230344441EC1918CD7F471C83AD6"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读4小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":5,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":13229,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":1526},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7609979701643133720","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"还不错。
非重生非穿越，女主聪明冷静理智，比起重生先导条件下更欣赏女主这种原始性格坚韧的，主体性蛮强，一些小细节有点问题不过可以忽略。副本故事精彩。
期待爆更😋，作者加油[送心]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1771838891,"group_id":"7582555006851615806","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7L147+EKyEhBKGQjJDtDqQ/O+qumhOUPhJr8ixq+l1k","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"4285236175714476","user_name":"我想咋样就咋样"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4285236175714476","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7582555006851615806","book_info":{"abstract":"【末世天灾+游戏降临+升级流+无CP+生死游戏】
